title: Synchronized global crop failure — three major staples
historical_analogue: 2010-11 food price crisis (Arab Spring trigger), 2022 Ukraine war food crisis
description: Concurrent El Niño and La Niña effects plus geopolitical export restrictions trigger simultaneous wheat, corn, and soy shortfalls. 40+ countries restrict food exports. Food inflation runs at 25%+. Social instability in import-dependent nations rises.
